nodes.shortSummary: 红尾彗星蜂鸟（学名：Sappho sparganurus），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类，是红尾彗星蜂鸟属的唯一物种。 红尾彗星蜂鸟体重约5.3克，翼长约63.2毫米，嘴峰长约20.1毫米，喙宽度约1.9毫米，喙厚度约1.7毫米，跗蹠长约6毫米，尾长约86.6毫米。红尾彗星蜂鸟在其…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red-tailed comet (Sappho sparganurus) is a medium-sized hummingbird belonging to tribe Lesbiini of subfamily Lesbiinae, the "coquettes". It is found in Argentina and Bolivia and possibly Chile and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: sapho is variously placed in central Bolivia and northern and western Argentina, in southern Bolivia, northern and western Argentina, and east-central Chile, and from southern Bolivia to western Argentina and northern Chile. The red-tailed comet inhabits arid montane scrublands on the eastern slope of the Andes and in valleys within the Andes
